top3.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 592
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races rs ON r.raceId = rs.raceId
WHERE rs.raceId = 592
  AND r.statusId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 592
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races rs ON r.raceId = rs.raceId
WHERE rs.raceId = 592
  AND r.statusId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
WHERE r.raceId = 592
  AND r.statusId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 592
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.dob
FROM races r
JOIN results res ON r.raceId = res.raceId
JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE r.raceId = 592
  AND res.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races rs ON r.raceId = rs.raceId
WHERE rs.raceId = 592
  AND r.statusId IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT d.forename, d.surname, d.dob
FROM drivers d
JOIN results r ON d.driverId = r.driverId
JOIN races ra ON r.raceId = ra.raceId
WHERE ra.raceId = 592
  AND r.position IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.dob ASC
LIMIT 1;
